# Web server port
server.port=8080

# Actuator endpoints exposure (only what is needed for monitoring)
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info

# Health endpoint details (useful for monitoring systems)

# Keep actuator on the same port/base path (default /actuator)

# Basic app info (optional)

info.app.name=core-service
info.app.description=Date endpoint + Actuator health monitoring
